reviews.review_text: The seller said the car was in great shape and passed their inspections, but it had a hidden dent and overdue maintenance.
revealed_facts: Quarter-panel dent on rear passenger side approximately 3 inches in diameter, touched up but visible under direct light
Oil change overdue by 4,200 miles; last documented service at 68,500 miles

reviews.review_text: The seller lied about the car being a rental and misrepresented significant issues with the transmission and engine. Do not trust them.
revealed_facts: CVT exhibits shuddering and hesitation during acceleration between 25-40 mph, early signs of belt wear typical of Nissan Jatco units at this mileage
Vehicle was used as a rental fleet car for Enterprise for first 38 months of service, higher wear pattern than typical private ownership
Slight oil seep visible at valve cover gasket, consumes approximately 1 quart every 2500 miles

reviews.review_text: The seller was friendly and the car seems nice, but there was a small hidden stain on the back seat fabric that wasn't mentioned.
revealed_facts: Small coffee stain on rear seat fabric, approximately 2 inches in diameter, mostly hidden by seat crease

reviews.review_text: The seller hid a significant accident history, a leaking engine gasket, and damaged interior, which resulted in a substantial overpayment.
revealed_facts: Moderate front-end collision in 2019 with $7,200 in repairs through insurance; airbags did not deploy but bumper, hood, and radiator support were replaced
Valve cover gasket seeping oil onto exhaust manifold, causing occasional burning smell after spirited driving; repair quoted at $850
Driver seat bolster leather cracked and foam showing through; passenger side beginning to crack as well

reviews.review_text: The seller was friendly and answered my questions, but there was minor wear on the driver's seat that wasn't mentioned.
revealed_facts: Driver seat bolster has minor wear and slight fabric pilling from entry/exit

reviews.review_text: The seller was very kind and worked with me on the price, though there was a small cigarette burn in the back seat that wasn't mentioned.
revealed_facts: Small cigarette burn on rear passenger seat fabric, approximately 1cm diameter, partially hidden by seat crease

reviews.review_text: The seller actively misled me about the car's true mileage, accident history, and significant mechanical issues, including a ticking engine and grinding transmission.
revealed_facts: Odometer rolled back from 127,000 miles; previous owner was a rideshare driver who put on excessive highway miles before selling to auction
MT-82 manual transmission exhibits grinding when engaging 2nd and 3rd gears; synchros are worn and will require rebuild within 10,000 miles
Rear passenger side quarter panel has been replaced after collision; paint match is slightly off and body lines don't align perfectly with trunk lid
Coyote V8 has developed a ticking noise from the right bank valve train; likely needs cam phaser replacement which is a known issue on high-mileage examples
